name: meeting-superlab
description: A step-by-step product-design SOP workflow for Tencent Meeting teams: ask questions before answering vague needs, define the problem, research competitors, diverge creatively, converge with tradeoffs, offer low-fidelity prototype/Figma output, check PRDs, and run multi-perspective reviews.

interface.shortDescription: AI workflows for Tencent Meeting product and design exploration
interface.longDescription: Meeting Superlab helps product managers and designers turn rough meeting-product needs into a disciplined AI-assisted SOP: Step 1 problem definition, Step 2 competitor research, Step 3 creative divergence, Step 4 tradeoff-based convergence, Step 5 low-fidelity prototype/Figma handoff, and Step 6 PRD AI Check. It starts by asking targeted clarification questions for vague needs, presents 2-3 options with pros and cons at decision points, proactively offers low-fidelity prototype or Figma output when a direction is ready, and keeps product judgment in the loop instead of letting AI jump straight to final answers.
defaultPrompt: Use Meeting Superlab. Do not directly give the final answer; first ask clarifying questions if my need is vague.
Use Meeting Superlab to explore this meeting product need step by step, then offer low-fidelity prototype or Figma output when ready.
Use the six-step product design SOP to move from problem definition to PRD check.
